programmes.show_description: After drinking half a bottle of vodka, a man is accused of slapping his girlfriend and destroying her belongings; he claims she attacked him. S18, Ep5
A man sues his ex-boyfriend's sister-in-law for falsely accusing him of burglarizing her home. S18, Ep6
A young man refuses to pay what he allegedly owes when he discovers he was subleasing instead of leasing; his sublessors say he stole a TV off the wall. S23, Ep230
'Mr. Incredible' and 'Cookie' make an appearance as a show of support for their owner who alleged violates a lease by owning a third dog. S23, Ep231
A lethal judicial combination escalates when two young boys go for a joy ride that ends in a collision. S23, Ep232
A teenager, rushing to her therapy appointment, witnesses her boyfriend initiate a violent attack on a slower driver's car. S23, Ep233
While on a walk with a non-verbal patient, a woman claims she was bitten by a guard dog who was allegedly going for her client. S23, Ep234
A dog care provider accuses a pet owner of dropping off her dogs and not returning for six months; the pet owner says she neglected her animals and harassed her. S23, Ep235
The Judge reprimands ex-lovers for allegedly using claims of child abuse to get even with each other. S23, Ep236
A student denies stealing her ex-stepmother's identity and sues for damages from allegedly false charges. S10, Ep260
Lying teenagers, rocks thrown at cars from a bridge, and felony charges come into play when $7,000 in restitution fees is disputed by angry parents. S18, Ep1
The decomposed bodies of two victims are found in an irrigation canal in Bakersfield, California, but how can a killer be caught if evidence is washed away? S10, Ep14
Behavioural profiling can be useful to catch a killer, but it can also be misleading, as police found out in one particular case. DNA put them back on track. S10, Ep15
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
When an American tourist is killed in a Mexican resort, police on both sides of the border use forensic evidence to uncover a sinister truth. S9, Ep28
In 1988, a banker's wife is kidnapped and the police struggle to break the case until entomology and computer forensics help to reveal a new suspect. S9, Ep29
A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife in their pool. However, the man claims he has no explanation and no recollection of the crime. S9, Ep30
An unfortunate soul is burnt to death when a house bursts into flames, but careful investigation reveals the fire was not an accident. S10, Ep1
It would be 50 years before a murderous criminal in California would be caught, thanks to advancements in computer technology and handwriting analysis. S10, Ep2
Investigators piece together tiny clues at the scene of a hit and run accident. Their findings help to track down the offending driver. S10, Ep3
Investigating the disappearance of 6-year-old Etan Patz and the case that haunts the detectives who spent more than three decades trying to find him. S30, Ep19
Two witnesses who watched a woman gunned down in her Florida home by someone in a clown costume speak out for the first time on network television. S30, Ep20
A wealthy lawyer shoots his wife from the backseat of a car - was it a tragic accident or cold-blooded murder? S30, Ep21
An NHS manager cooks up a scam with his mates to line their pockets with two hundred and fifty thousand pounds. S1, Ep4
In December 2000, Mike Williams headed out onto the lake to hunt for ducks and never returned. It was believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators. S1, Ep7
Voncile Smith lived in a rural but wealthy neighbourhood in Pensacola with two of her sons, Richard and John, and assets worth over $1 million dollars. In 2015, their bodies are found. S1, Ep8
DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store - could they have captured Ervin's killer? S5, Ep1
After serving time for domestic violence, a man sues his ex-fiance for an engagement ring, a forged pay cheque and stolen property. S10, Ep232
Divorced parents dispute financial responsibility by their teenager's parking tickets and court fees. A professional arm wrestler is accused of beating up her roommate. S10, Ep233
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for thousands in medical bills and living expenses, claiming he took advantage of her and her mother. S10, Ep234
After a teenager's college fund is spent to bail her boyfriend out of jail, an angry mother demands that he pay her daughter back. S10, Ep235
A teenager is allegedly humiliated in karate class and an angry mother wants a refund. S10, Ep236
Former best friends move in together only to fight about childcare and sue over damaged personal property. Young victims of Hurricane Katrina fight over relocation fees. S10, Ep237
Divorced parents of three fight over a lawn car business, big screen TV and child support. S10, Ep238
When a grandmother is ten minutes late in returning her grandson to his father, all hell breaks loose because they miss their movie at the mall. S23, Ep202
After a high-speed chase, the driver of a getaway car serves time for robbery; the Judge goes after his missing partner in crime. S23, Ep203
When a teenager allegedly has a temper tantrum in the shower, her mother sues her for over 2K in damages. S23, Ep204
A woman discovers in a text message that her husband is loaning money to another woman. S23, Ep205
Parents are nowhere to be found when children start a car and crash into a pond; two kids save themselves by jumping out the window. S23, Ep206
After allegedly being t-boned by a fellow cyclist, a woman claims he was more concerned with his unopened liquor bottle than her wellbeing. S23, Ep207
A man confesses that his dog damaged a neighbour's property but only after clear video surveillance catches him in the act. S23, Ep208
Victims of a hit-and-run car accident are asked to identify the alleged perpetrator in court. S10, Ep239
A tenant claims he lost everything when his ex-girlfriend and landlord conspired to have him illegally evicted. The landlord sues him for harassment and vandalism. S10, Ep240
In December 2000, Mike Williams headed out onto the lake to hunt for ducks and never returned. It was believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators. S1, Ep7
Voncile Smith lived in a rural but wealthy neighbourhood in Pensacola with two of her sons, Richard and John, and assets worth over $1 million dollars. In 2015, their bodies are found. S1, Ep8
In 1996, a sexual attacker was tracked down and detained, but years later, new forensic science sheds new light on the case. S7, Ep16
Find out how man's best friend helped police track down the killer of a helpless couple. S7, Ep17
A woman falls into a fairytale romance, becomes pregnant and then gets terribly ill. Doctors assure her she's fine, but she's not so certain. S7, Ep18
Faryion Wardrip was a typical, honest citizen on the outside, but a brutal serial killer on the inside. DNA testing proved to be his demise. S7, Ep19
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
When an elderly couple die in a house fire, police suspect their son to be the culprit. Will further investigation reveal the truth? S10, Ep4
Twenty years after a mother of two was found dead, thanks to advanced forensic technology, evidence was revisited and investigators closed in on the killer. S10, Ep5
When the skull of a woman is found in a Texas canyon, investigators discover that she was stabbed. Can they track down the killer? S10, Ep6
When a woman went missing on holiday in Key West, Florida, all police found was her shoes. Video evidence suggested there might be a killer afoot. S10, Ep7
A woman is found dead in bed with a gun in hand and suicide notes close by. It looks like suicide, but curious evidence suggests otherwise. S10, Ep8
Investigators must piece together fragments of a computer disc to discover who murdered the wife of a serviceman in the Philippines. S10, Ep9
A young mother calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there's no way she did it to herself. S30, Ep22
Lorenzen Wright was a superstar player in the NBA and a hometown hero. That ended in July 2010 during a call to 911. The chilling recording captured his dying words. S30, Ep23
An accounts worker at a cancer hospital syphons off six hundred and forty-two thousand pounds of NHS money. S1, Ep5
A manager treats the NHS like a cash machine. An organised crime gang try to swindle thirteen million pounds. S2, Ep1
Samira was a fashion model in Paris when she met Adam Frasch. In 2014, Samira's handyman arrives to their home and is horrified to find Samira dead in the family pool. S1, Ep9
Makeva Jenkins was shot in the head by a masked intruder while asleep in 2017. Her brother's 911 call launched an investigation into a financially motivated crime. S1, Ep10
Student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in a hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras and quickly unravel a serial attacker. S5, Ep2
Ex-roommates dispute an alleged assault and damages from `Internet harassment'. A six-year-old boy is accused of vandalising a church and a neighbour's car. S10, Ep244
Neighbours dispute damages after a teenager plows into a truck with his snowmobile. S10, Ep241
The cost of long-distance calls destroys a friendship between women who met online. College students dispute their rental agreement. S10, Ep247
A man claims he was falsely arrested after being accused of assaulting a teenager and stealing a truck. Ex-friends sue him for harassment. S10, Ep243
A man claims he was brutally assaulted during the heated exchange of property between estranged lovers. S10, Ep245
A woman claims she loaned her out-of-state boyfriend thousands of dollars so he could move to be with her. S10, Ep246
A 12-year-old is accused of shooting a child in the head with a plastic-pellet cap gun. A student insists that the money his stepmother gave him for college was a gift. S10, Ep242
A woman admits that she gained access to her boyfriend's private texts, but claims he is the one who lobbed a brick through a car window. S23, Ep209
When a mother and daughter get into a catfight over an estranged husband, younger siblings are collateral damage. S23, Ep210
A wooden barricade blocks a young delivery driver who gets stuck in the ice and mud; a property owner allegedly goes ballistic and steals the truck's keys. S23, Ep211
A man is so mad at his neighbour's fence shenanigans that he claims he'll turn his retirement property into a halfway house to upset her. S23, Ep212
A man is desperate to be repaid after making a deal with a friend in order to take care of his sick dog's surgery. S23, Ep213
